title: Mark Morisseau & The Prairie Fiddlers
excerpt: Please join us on Wednesday, May 31, 2023 at the St Francois Xavier Church for a concert showcasing fiddlers from emerging artists to recording musicians. Doors open at 6:30pm and showtime is at...
bodyHtml: Please join us on Wednesday, May 31, 2023 at the St Francois Xavier Church for a concert showcasing fiddlers from emerging artists to recording musicians. Doors open at 6:30pm and showtime is at 7:00pm. Please follow this link to purchase tickets. See you there!
